elements.text: You are told you need to give a presentation to other members of your student club. When it is time to present, you have a sip of water and wonder what the other students will think of you. As you begin to speak, you feel scared and decide to...

elements.name: a_sip_of_water--social_situations--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
